name: Peter S. Kastner -- Litigation Biography and Expert Witness Credentials
description: This document presents Peter S. Kastner's biography as an IT expert witness, including his 30+ year career background and a detailed account of five litigation engagements spanning 1989–1997. Cases involve complex computer system disputes including mainframe design, software development breach of contract, bid protests for distributed government systems, trademark infringement, and ERP implementation failure. The document establishes Kastner's credentials for future expert witness retentions.
